name: Feature request

## Use case

What decision-making friction should this remove?

## Desired behavior

Describe the input, action, and output.

## Privacy and safety

- [ ] This feature does not present itself as legal, medical, financial, or psychological advice.
- [ ] Any third-party data transfer is explicit and optional.
- [ ] Sensitive local decision data remains protected.
